questions.q: Which number President of India is Droupadi Murmu?
questions.explanation: Droupadi Murmu is the fifteenth President of India.

questions.q: In which year did Droupadi Murmu become President of India?
questions.explanation: She assumed the office of President in 2022.

questions.q: What notable distinction does Droupadi Murmu hold as President?
options: First person from a tribal community
questions.explanation: She is the first person from a tribal community to hold the office of President.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu is the President of which country?
questions.explanation: She is the President of India.

questions.q: Of which state was Droupadi Murmu the Governor before becoming President?
questions.explanation: She served as Governor of Jharkhand before her election as President.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu is the President in which respect among women holders of the office?
questions.explanation: She is the second woman to hold the office, after Pratibha Patil.

questions.q: Whom did Droupadi Murmu succeed as President of India?
questions.explanation: She succeeded Ram Nath Kovind, the fourteenth President, in 2022.

questions.q: Which gubernatorial post did Droupadi Murmu hold prior to the presidency?
questions.explanation: She was Governor of Jharkhand before becoming President.

questions.q: What is the term length of the office of President that Droupadi Murmu holds?
questions.explanation: The President of India is elected for a five-year term.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu, as President, resides in which official building in New Delhi?
questions.explanation: The President's official residence is Rashtrapati Bhavan.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu began her political career in which state's legislature?
questions.explanation: She was earlier a legislator in Odisha before her gubernatorial and presidential roles.

questions.q: As President, Droupadi Murmu is the supreme commander of which force?
questions.explanation: The President of India is the supreme commander of the armed forces.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu was elected President through which process?
options: A direct vote of all citizens
questions.explanation: The President is elected by an electoral college of MPs and state legislators.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu is the second woman President; who was the first?
questions.explanation: Pratibha Patil was the first woman President of India.

questions.q: Under the Constitution, Droupadi Murmu as President forms part of which institution?
questions.explanation: Parliament consists of the President and the two Houses, so the President is part of Parliament.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu's tenure as President began in which sequence after Ram Nath Kovind?
options: Immediately after, as the next President
questions.explanation: She is the fifteenth President, immediately succeeding the fourteenth, Ram Nath Kovind.

questions.q: Which community distinction is specifically associated with Droupadi Murmu's presidency?
questions.explanation: She is the first person from a tribal community to hold the office of President.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu hails from which state, where she held early political offices?
questions.explanation: She is from Odisha, where she served in the state legislature earlier in her career.

questions.q: As President, Droupadi Murmu performs which role with respect to Bills passed by Parliament?
questions.explanation: The President assents to Bills, withholds assent, or may return certain Bills for reconsideration.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu's gubernatorial appointment to Jharkhand was made by which authority?
questions.explanation: Governors are appointed by the President of India under Article 155.

questions.q: As Governor of Jharkhand before her presidency, Droupadi Murmu acted as the constitutional head at which level?
questions.explanation: A Governor is the constitutional head of a state, the role she held in Jharkhand.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu is described as which numbered occupant in the line of Presidents of India?
questions.explanation: She is the fifteenth President of India.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu took the presidential oath before which authority, as required by the Constitution?
options: The Speaker of the Lok Sabha
questions.explanation: Under Article 60, the President takes the oath of office before the Chief Justice of India.

questions.q: As President, under which article may Droupadi Murmu grant pardons and reprieves?
questions.explanation: Article 72 vests the pardoning power in the President of India.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu's election as President is conducted under which constitutional provision for the electoral college?
questions.explanation: Article 54 provides for the President's election by an electoral college.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu is the fifteenth President; who served as the fourteenth, immediately before her?
questions.explanation: Ram Nath Kovind was the fourteenth President, immediately preceding Droupadi Murmu.

questions.q: The Union executive powers vested in the President, the office Murmu holds, are described in which Part of the Constitution?
questions.explanation: Part V of the Constitution deals with the Union, including the President and the Union executive.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu, as President, addresses the first session of Parliament each year under which constitutional duty?
options: A vote in the Lok Sabha
The President's Address to both Houses
questions.explanation: Under Article 87, the President addresses both Houses of Parliament at the start of the year's first session.

questions.q: Droupadi Murmu's qualification for the presidency is governed by which constitutional article?
questions.explanation: Article 58 sets out the qualifications for election as President of India.

questions.q: Including Droupadi Murmu, how many women had served as President of India by 2022?
questions.explanation: Pratibha Patil and Droupadi Murmu are the two women to have held the office by 2022.
